title: CLAUDE.md — arr-stack
summary: Project runbook for AI assistants describing conventions, workflows, and pitfalls (the HOW), complementing spec.md (the WHAT/WHY).
notes: MANIFEST_TYPE=DOC authoritative. Document explicitly defers WHAT/WHY to spec.md and embeds references to ADR-5, ADR-6, ADR-7 and spec sections (§6.5, §7, §10, §11, §12) which are owned by spec.md — no decisions or requirements are introduced here, only conventions, runbook procedures, and pointers.
